title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out and about with Admire Vega...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice her eyeing up a claw machine filled with
Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking about it... Not for me, though.
For a friend.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, never mind. Let's hurry back and train.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She steps forward, but then her head turns as if
someone yanked on her hair. I think she's putting
on a front.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh? I told you... I don't need it.
choice_data_list:
You might change your mind once you have
one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
